name: @pajama-studio/prefab-store
description: Generic prefab storage for the Pajama Studio prefab framework: the PrefabStore protocol, a REST client, and an open-source Cloudflare D1 server you can deploy with one wrangler command.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp -r src/server/schema.sql src/server/wrangler.toml server-template/ 2>/dev/null || true
